name: Skull Basher
description: A feared weapon in the right hands, this maul's ability to shatter the defenses of its opponents should not be underestimated.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attacks a chance to stun the target and deal bonus physical damage. Cooldown: 2.3. Mana Cost: 0. Proc Chance: 25%. Damage: 100. Stun Duration: 1.2. Proc Chance: 10%.
